intitule: Exercise 1: Match the Weather to the Picture

enonce.texte: Instructions: Match each weather description to the correct picture. (Relie chaque description météo à l'image correcte.)
images: A bright yellow sun shining in a blue sky.
Grey clouds covering the sky with raindrops falling.
A person holding an umbrella against the wind, with leaves blowing.
A landscape with thick white fog, making it hard to see.

questions.texte: The sky is blue and the sun is shining. It is ______.
It is raining outside. You need an umbrella. It is ______.
The wind is blowing strongly. It is ______.
You cannot see far because of the white mist. It is ______.

intitule: Exercise 2: Identify the Weather in the Sentence

enonce.texte: Instructions: Read each sentence and identify the weather described. (Lis chaque phrase et identifie la météo décrite.)

questions.texte: The children are playing outside because the sun is shining.
We cannot go to the market because it is too difficult to see through the mist.
People are using umbrellas and wearing raincoats.
The trees are moving and leaves are flying in the air.

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Look at the weather chart and answer the questions below. (Regarde le tableau météo et réponds aux questions ci-dessous.)

Weather Chart for the Week:

  • Monday: Sunny
  • Tuesday: Rainy
  • Wednesday: Cloudy
  • Thursday: Windy
  • Friday: Foggy
images: A simple table showing the weather for each day of the week with small icons (sun, raindrop, cloud, wind, fog).

questions.texte: What is the weather on Monday?
Which day is rainy?
What is the weather on Thursday?
Which two days have different weather?
questions.reponse: Monday and Tuesday (or any two different days).

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Complete the sentences with the correct weather word. (Complète les phrases avec le mot météo correct.)

Word box: sunny, cloudy, foggy, rainy, windy.

questions.texte: The sky is grey. There are many clouds. It is ______.
We can see a lot of white mist. It is ______.
The sun is very bright. It is ______.
The wind is blowing very fast. It is ______.

enonce.texte: Instructions: Listen to your teacher and repeat these sentences. Pay attention to the pronunciation of and, but, and for. (Écoute ton enseignant et répète ces phrases. Fais attention à la prononciation de and, but et for.)

questions.texte: It is sunny and hot.
questions.reponse: The word 'and' is pronounced as /ən/ or /nd/ in weak form.

questions.texte: It is rainy but warm.
questions.reponse: The word 'but' is pronounced as /bət/ in weak form.

questions.texte: It is sunny for three days.
questions.reponse: The word 'for' is pronounced as /fər/ in weak form.

questions.texte: It is cold and windy, but not rainy.
questions.reponse: Both 'and' and 'but' are in their weak forms.

enonce.texte: Instructions: Look at the picture and describe the weather in 3 sentences. Use the words from the lesson. (Regarde l'image et décris la météo en 3 phrases. Utilise les mots de la leçon.)
images: A landscape with a bright sun, some white clouds, and a person wearing sunglasses.

questions.texte: Describe the weather in the picture in 3 sentences.
questions.reponse: The weather is sunny. There are a few white clouds in the sky. It is hot, so the person is wearing sunglasses.

enonce.texte: Instructions: Imagine you are a weather reporter. Write a short weather report for your town. Use at least 3 weather words and mention the temperature. (Imagine que tu es un présentateur météo. Écris un court bulletin météo pour ta ville. Utilise au moins 3 mots sur la météo et mentionne la température.)

questions.texte: Write a short weather report for your town.
questions.reponse: Good morning! Today is sunny and hot in Yaoundé. The temperature is 30 degrees Celsius. It will be cloudy in the afternoon, but no rain is expected. The wind is light. Have a nice day!

enonce.texte: Instructions: Complete the sentences with and, but, or for. (Complète les phrases avec and, but ou for.)

questions.texte: It is sunny ______ hot.
It is rainy ______ warm.
We stayed inside ______ it was raining.
It was cold ______ windy.

intitule: Exercise 9: Answer Questions About the Weather

enonce.texte: Instructions: Answer the following questions about the weather. (Réponds aux questions suivantes sur la météo.)

questions.texte: What is your favourite kind of weather? Why?
questions.reponse: My favourite kind of weather is sunny because I like to play outside with my friends.

questions.texte: What do you do when it is rainy?
questions.reponse: When it is rainy, I stay inside and read a book or do my homework.

questions.texte: How is the weather today in your town?
questions.reponse: Today, the weather is sunny and hot in my town.

intitule: Exercise 10: Identify the Weather from a Dialogue

enonce.texte:
Instructions: Read the dialogue and identify the weather they are talking about. (Lis le dialogue et identifie la météo dont ils parlent.)

Dialogue:

Person A: 'The leaves are flying everywhere! I can barely walk.'

Person B: 'Yes, it's very strong today. We should stay inside.'

questions.texte: What kind of weather are they talking about?
questions.reponse: They are talking about windy weather.
